zs.t: abbr. 零偏移（zero shift）；（英国）动物协会（ Zoological Society）
zs.d:
n the ending of a series or sequence
n the 26th letter of the Roman alphabet

zsigmondy.t: 席格蒙迪(Richard, 1865-1929, 奥地利化学家, 曾获1925年诺贝尔化学奖)
zsigmondy.d: n German chemist (born in Austria) honored for his research on colloidal solutions (1865-1929)

zsigmondy's movements.t: [医] 希格蒙迪氏运动, 布朗氏运动(分子运动)
